who: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 overtime approvals/month
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 overtime approvals/month, manual tracking causes compliance violations. We automate alerts instead of manual tracking.
problem: Ensuring compliance with overtime policies and managing violations effectively.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video links
Share insights in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try Overtime approval tracking and dashboard for free
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy reuse
Set default reminder schedules for approvals
Allow CSV import for existing overtime data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
